steps.title: Read the original vertex
steps.content: From the graph, the parabola opens upward and has vertex $(2,-2)$.

steps.title: Move the graph upward
steps.content:
A translation up $4$ units keeps each x-coordinate the same and adds $4$ to each y-coordinate. The vertex moves as follows:
$$(2,-2)\to(2,-2+4)=(2,2)$$
The resulting graph has vertex $(2,2)$. The answer is A.
